tool.name: Gemini for Workspace
tool.description: Workspace assistant now bundled across plans with Google productivity and collaboration integration.
tool.statusNote: Bundled into Workspace plans in January 2025 with higher base pricing.
tool.logoNotes: Official Gemini product logo asset from the owner-controlled Google Workspace Gemini page (`logo_gemini_2025_color_2x_web_96dp.png`), verified byte-for-byte against the live source on 2026-05-14; Google uses this shared Gemini mark across Workspace Gemini packaging.
tool.practitionerNote: Pragmatic for Google Workspace estates that want AI features embedded in existing docs, mail, and meetings without a separate assistant rollout.

dataResidency.detail: Workspace data-residency settings and EU data-boundary protections; LLM processing can cross regions for capacity.

deployment.detail: SaaS bundled into Google Workspace; no self-hosted option.

auditLogging.detail: Workspace Admin Activity audit logs cover Gemini-in-Workspace actions.

soc2.detail: SOC 1/2/3 for Gemini across Workspace apps (Aug 2024).

euAiAct.detail: Assessed limited-risk by product category; no published vendor EU AI Act conformity assessment.
